text:
SOURCE: 79541391.pdf
IDENTITY: Candidate Profile (79541391.pdf)
SUMMARY: Experienced IT professional with a strong background in inventory management, asset disposal, and technical support. Holds a Bachelor of Science in Computer Science & Business from Oneonta State University and is certified in Network Security.
SKILLS: Inventory Management, Asset Disposal, Technical Support, Customer Service, Wireless Network Configuration and Security, Computer Hardware and Software Troubleshooting, Quality Control, Data Entry and Data Cleaning, Procurement and Inventory Tracking, Standard Operating Procedures Development, Classification System Development, Location Verification, Furniture Disposal Process Management, Furniture Issuance Procedure Management, Processing PO Orders Procedure Management, Database Management (SQL, MS Access), Microsoft Excel, Order Processing and Packing, Credit Card Payments Processing, Shipping and Logistics, Training Facilitation

SOURCE: 79541391.pdf
JOB TITLE: Information Technology Assistant (PMICU)
COMPANY: UNHQ
DATES: January 2008 to October 2011
DESCRIPTION: ['Organized all PMICU Stockrooms.', 'Performed physical inventory counts of all PMICU Stockrooms.', 'Processed Work Orders using MP-2 / iNeed (Work order software).', 'Printed Barcodes for all Departments/Offices of UNHQ.', 'Issued and received Furniture from PMICU Stockrooms.', 'Helped staff members find furniture that better suited their needs.', 'Coordinated/facilitated furniture relocation to offsite locations.', 'Supervised 1-10 movers during the liquidation of assets for Secretariat and Conference building vacate exercise.', 'Assisted with Furniture Disposals and updated Procure Plus records accordingly.', 'Coordinated all IT disposals with OICT and movers, updating Procure Plus records accordingly.', 'Administered IT disposal service contract.', 'Managed property records as the Property Records Custodian for FMS.', "Developed Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs) for unit, including 'Furniture Disposal Process', 'Furniture Issuance Procedure', and 'Processing PO Orders Procedure'.", 'Developed a classification system for furniture used in Unit Operations, warehouse, and physical inventories based on UNCCS item codes.', 'Organized multiple new offsite stockrooms (45,000 sq ft).', 'Performed periodic stockroom counts for over 5,000 assets.', 'Organized relocation of approximately 10,000 assets between various stockrooms during the vacate exercise of Secretariat building.', 'Handled deliveries of furniture averaging $200,000.', 'Performed Location Verification exercise for entire UNHQ Campus during the 2008 Physical Inventory.', 'Identified and updated over 10,000 items into Procure Plus, affecting $2.4M in official UNHQ inventory.', 'Assisted in the removal of all furniture and abandoned property during the liquidation of Secretariat and Conference buildings (630,000 sq ft).', 'Relocated, consolidated, and organized wood furniture into appropriate stockrooms to cut down physical inventory count by more than 50%.']

SOURCE: 79541391.pdf
JOB TITLE: Information Technology Assistant (BCSS)
COMPANY: UNHQ
DATES: September 2007 to December 2007
DESCRIPTION: ['Managed a variety of expendable and non-expendable audio-visual supplies.', 'Arranged the contents of the stockroom and receiving areas in a manner that maintains a safe and efficient working environment.', 'Participated in periodic physical inventories of UN equipment to ensure accuracy of serial and barcode numbers.', 'Surveyed broken audio-visual equipment for disposal.', 'Performed asset management through Procure Plus.', 'Cleaned up data fields in Procure Plus.', 'Entered data on all incoming and outgoing expendable and non-expendable stock items.']

SOURCE: 79541391.pdf
JOB TITLE: Technical Support Representative
COMPANY: UNHQ
DATES: July 2005 to September 2007
DESCRIPTION: ['Managed inventory of assigned IT products in the work car.', 'Assisted in yearly storewide physical inventory.', 'Performed customer service.', 'Provided client/technician phone support.', 'Configured and secured wireless networks.', 'Diagnosed computer hardware and software issues.', 'Troubleshooted and resolved computer problems, including hardware, software, virus, network, and video issues.', 'Evaluated the needs of clients and sold them necessary computer software solutions.']

SOURCE: 79541391.pdf
JOB TITLE: QA Compliance
COMPANY: UNHQ
DATES: September 2002 to July 2007
DESCRIPTION: ['Tracked and managed resources using Great Plains and MS Excel.', 'Assisted in yearly warehouse inventory.', 'Organized the warehouse stockroom.', 'Ordered supplies from vendors.', 'Processed outgoing order shipments.', 'Processed customer credit card payments.', 'Processed orders over the phone.', 'Performed quality control.', 'Ensured that orders went out correctly and on time.', 'Facilitated employee training.']

SOURCE: 79541391.pdf
DEGREE: Bachelor of Science
INSTITUTION: Oneonta State University
DATES:
